requirementOrder.title: Requirement Ordering
requirementOrder.description: Requirements should appear in ascending numeric order within the document.

duplicateId.title: Duplicate Requirement IDs
duplicateId.description: Each requirement ID must be unique within the document.

missingStatus.title: Missing Status
missingStatus.description: Each requirement must declare its lifecycle status using a [Status] bracket.

emptyBody.title: Empty Requirement Body
emptyBody.description: Each requirement should contain descriptive body content.

weakModal.title: Weak Modal Verbs
weakModal.description: Mandatory requirements should use SHALL. Weak modals such as 'should' or 'may' make obligations unclear and harder to verify.
weakModal.message: {id}: '{term}' found — use SHALL for mandatory requirements.

ambiguousWords.title: Ambiguous Words
ambiguousWords.description: Vague terms make requirements difficult to verify. Replace with measurable, testable criteria.
ambiguousWords.message: {id}: Ambiguous term '{term}' — replace with a measurable criterion.

forbiddenTerms.title: Forbidden Terms
forbiddenTerms.description: Placeholder terms indicate incomplete requirements that must be resolved before release.
forbiddenTerms.message: {id}: Forbidden term '{term}' must be resolved before release.

wordCount.title: Requirement Length
wordCount.description: Requirements exceeding the word limit may be too complex to verify. Consider splitting into smaller, independent requirements.
wordCount.message: {id} is too long ({actual} words, limit {maxWords}). Consider splitting.

multipleShall.title: Multiple SHALL Statements
multipleShall.description: Each requirement should express a single obligation. Multiple SHALL statements may indicate the requirement should be split.
multipleShall.message: {id} contains {count} SHALL statements. Each requirement should express one obligation.

vagueQuantifiers.title: Vague Quantifiers
vagueQuantifiers.description: Avoid non-measurable quantities that cannot be objectively verified.
vagueQuantifiers.message: {id}: Vague quantifier '{term}' found. Replace with a measurable quantity.

escapeClauses.title: Escape Clauses
escapeClauses.description: Avoid wording that weakens or makes a requirement conditional without objective criteria.
escapeClauses.message: {id}: Escape clause '{term}' found. Replace with an objective, verifiable condition.

undefinedAcronyms.title: Undefined Acronyms
undefinedAcronyms.description: Acronyms should be defined before first use. Define with the pattern: Full Name (ACRONYM).
undefinedAcronyms.message: {id}: '{term}' appears to be an undefined acronym. Define it as: Full Name ({term}).

multipleSentences.title: Multiple Sentences
multipleSentences.description: Requirements should normally contain a single sentence expressing one obligation.
multipleSentences.message: {id} contains {count} sentences. Consider splitting it into separate requirements.
